ideas.title: Habit Streak Tracker
ideas.description: Track your daily habits with beautiful streak visualizations. Get motivated by seeing your progress over time.

ideas.title: Quick Recipe Finder
ideas.description: Snap a photo of ingredients you have and get recipe suggestions instantly using AI.

ideas.title: Mood Journal
ideas.description: Log your daily mood with just one tap. See patterns and insights about your emotional wellbeing.

ideas.title: Split Bill Calculator
ideas.description: Never argue about splitting the check again. Handles tips, tax, and uneven splits.

ideas.title: Focus Timer
ideas.description: Pomodoro timer with ambient sounds and productivity tracking. Stay focused, get things done.

ideas.title: Plant Care Reminder
ideas.description: Never forget to water your plants. Get reminders based on each plant's specific needs.

ideas.title: Workout Generator
ideas.description: Get personalized workout routines based on your fitness level and available equipment.

ideas.title: Language Flashcards
ideas.description: Learn new languages with spaced repetition flashcards. 10 minutes a day, fluency in months.

ideas.title: Budget Visualizer
ideas.description: See where your money goes with beautiful charts. Set goals and track spending patterns.

ideas.title: Micro Journal
ideas.description: Write just one sentence a day. Build a meaningful journal without the pressure.

ideas.title: Trivia Challenge
ideas.description: Daily trivia questions across multiple categories. Compete with friends on leaderboards.

ideas.title: Sleep Soundscapes
ideas.description: Relaxing ambient sounds to help you fall asleep. White noise, rain, ocean waves, and more.

ideas.title: Quick Poll Maker
ideas.description: Create instant polls and share with friends. Perfect for group decisions.

ideas.title: Closet Organizer
ideas.description: Catalog your wardrobe and get outfit suggestions. Never say 'I have nothing to wear' again.

ideas.title: Parking Spot Finder
ideas.description: Find and save where you parked. Set reminders for meter expiration.
